notes:
Ember 1.10.3 — Ember Search polish

• Press / anywhere on the search or results page to jump straight to the search box.
• The Customise panel now dims the page behind it and closes when you click away or press Esc; press Enter in a shortcut field to add it without reaching for the button.
• Site icons no longer send a referrer to the icon service (more private) and load lazily.
• Respects your system's "reduce motion" setting — the loading shimmer and hover effects calm down.
• Small accessibility touches: proper labels on the search box and the Customise button.

Builds on 1.10.2's brand-new Ember Search.
